spec_match.rationale: The Core Web Vitals history table is 100% simulated, and the live metric panels are raced and overwritten by a simulated setTimeout callback, rather than displaying actual PerformanceObserver data natively.

interactive.rationale: Interactive routing tabs with immediate metric cards updates and dynamic table rows.

blurb_alignment.rationale: Aligned with the CWV per Route description.

edge_cases.rationale: Feature detects support, but runs the simulation path unconditionally anyway, causing it to race and pollute the native path.

references.rationale: Violates repository hard rule: does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496.

design_system.rationale: Clean tabular history and card layout matching the show design guidelines.

openQuestions.title: Connect real PerformanceObservers to the history table and isolate simulation
openQuestions.detail: The history table is currently populated purely by simulated numbers. The simulation should be completely disabled when native soft-navigation is supported, and the history table should instead be updated from the real PerformanceObserver callbacks for soft-navigation and largest-contentful-paint entries.

openQuestions.title: Add ChromeStatus link (hard rule violation)
openQuestions.detail: The page does not contain a link to chromestatus.com/feature/5144837209194496, which violates the repository hard rule that every concept page must include a ChromeStatus link.
